\tzpentry{ID5885}{Volume Complete Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5885 introduces Volume Complete Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$J = \begin{pmatrix} \partial t'/\partial t & \partial t'/\partial x & \partial t'/\partial y & \partial t'/\partial z \\ \partial x'/\partial t & \partial x'/\partial x & \partial x'/\partial y & \partial x'/\partial z \\ \partial y'/\partial t & \partial y'/\partial x & \partial y'/\partial y & \partial y'/\partial z \\ \partial z'/\partial t & \partial z'/\partial x & \partial z'/\partial y & \partial z'/\partial z \end{pmatrix}$$
